title: calendula suffruticosa var. tomentosa
intro: Calendula suffruticosa var. tomentosa, also known as woolly marigold, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of Calendula suffruticosa var. tomentosa lie in its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include wound healing, skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and even anti-aging properties due to its high content of flavonoids and carotenoids. Herbal preparations of Calendula suffruticosa var. tomentosa can be found in the form of topical creams, ointments, and salves, as well as teas and tinctures for internal use.
